task_completion.description: The Sygic GPS Navigation app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic app interface is visible, typically showing a map view and a search bar.

task_completion.description: The agent searches for Kabul as the destination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Kabul' is typed into the search input field.

task_completion.description: The map or search context is successfully set to Kabul, Afghanistan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map displays the city of Kabul, or the search context explicitly shows Kabul as the selected location.
The word 'Hospital' (or related terms like 'Health', 'Medical') is entered in the search bar, or the Hospital POI category icon is selected in the UI.

task_completion.description: A list of hospitals located specifically in Kabul is displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of search results showing hospitals (e.g., French Medical Institute, Daoud Khan Military Hospital) or map pins with hospital icons in the Kabul area. The UI must indicate these are in Kabul, not near the device's current GPS location.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Sygic app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine interaction with the Sygic app's search and map interface, not a web browser or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results are not typed into a text editor, notes app, or terminal screen.

integrity.description: The hospital list is rendered by the app's native UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The hospital list appears as native UI elements with standard app formatting (e.g., distances, icons, map pins), rather than a static copy-pasted text list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location: Kabul, Afghanistan. Target category: Hospital (or Health/Medical). The app used is Sygic GPS Navigation. Known hospitals in Kabul include French Medical Institute for Children, Daoud Khan Military Hospital, Afghan-Japan Hospital, Jamhuriat Hospital, and EMERGENCY's Kabul Surgical Centre. The final view must show hospitals in Kabul, not near the device's current location.
